Reservations 예약

Reserve a table
at 110 Smithfield.

Seating every fifteen minutes, lunch and dinner. Parties of six or more — please call 412-600-1000 so we can prepare the long table.

SERVICE HOURS
LUNCH  · TUE–SAT · 11:30 — 14:30
DINNER · TUE–SAT · 16:30 — 21:00
SUN   · ALL DAY · 11:30 — 20:00
MON   · CLOSED

Holding a table past 15 minutes requires us to call you — please keep your phone nearby.

We'll confirm by email or phone within 2 hours.

스시 김 2
Sushi Kim 2

A 25-year Pittsburgh institution serving soulful Korean cooking and premium Japanese sushi in the heart of downtown.
